title: 这条 prompt 通过精细的场景描述和隐喻手法，将产品与高质量的制造过程联系起来，适合用于高端护肤品的广告宣传，强调产品的精致和高品质。
image_alt: 这条 prompt 通过精细的场景描述和隐喻手法，将产品与高质量的制造过程联系起来，适合用于高端护肤品的广告宣传，强调产品的精致和高品质。
prompt_original: A hyper-realistic miniature diorama product advertisement featuring an oversized luxury skincare pump bottle labeled "LUXEVEIL Skin Science - Radiance Nourishing Body Lotion" in cream/beige with a polished gold pump top, placed on a circular platform. Tiny figurine construction workers dressed in yellow coveralls and white hard hats swarm around the bottle climbing scaffolding, painting the bottle with rollers, operating a tower crane, working near industrial tanks and pipework, and unloading a miniature flatbed truck. The scene includes metal scaffolding structures, industrial silos, orange traffic cones, wooden barricades, and storage barrels. The overall color palette is warm beige, cream, gold, and mustard yellow. Studio photography style with soft diffused lighting, no shadows, clean beige background. The concept metaphorically shows workers "crafting" or "building" the perfect lotion. Tilt-shift miniature aesthetic, ultra-detailed, commercial product photography, 8K resolution, photorealistic CGI render.
prompt_zh: 一个超现实的微型立体模型产品广告，展示了一个巨大的奢华护肤泵瓶，标签为“LUXEVEIL Skin Science - Radiance Nourishing Body Lotion”，颜色为奶油/米色，顶部是抛光的金色泵头，放置在一个圆形平台上。微小的人物建筑工人穿着黄色连体工装和白色安全帽，围绕着瓶子爬脚手架、用滚筒刷漆、操作塔式起重机、在工业储罐和管道附近工作，以及卸载一辆微型平板卡车。场景中包括金属脚手架结构、工业筒仓、橙色交通锥、木制路障和储存桶。整体色调为温暖的米色、奶油色、金色和芥末黄。工作室摄影风格，柔和的散射光线，无阴影，干净的米色背景。这个概念隐喻地展示了工人“制作”或“建造”完美的乳液。移轴微型美学，超详细，商业产品摄影，8K分辨率，照片级真实感CGI渲染。
